intro: Pseudomaxillaria anceps, also known as Pseudomaxillaria or Pseudomaxillaria anceps, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, with its extracts exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, wounds, and skin infections.
